crime.value: Unauthorized submission of someone else's story to a school contest under their name
crime.quote: someone had entered in a story under her name without her knowledge or permission

victim.value: Gabby McFee, whose reputation and academic standing are at risk from the unauthorized submission
victim.quote: Gabby McFee had not turned in anything for the contest

closed_world.value: The high school environment where only students, faculty, and those with access could submit entries
closed_world.quote: The entire school board, faculty, and student council had read Gabby's report/story

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown culprit with suspected motives ranging from helping Gabby to sabotaging her
culprit_and_motive.quote: She topped the list of suspects right away. On everyone's list.

investigator.value: Gabby McFee herself, investigating who submitted her story without permission
investigator.quote: She has something to do with it.' Gabby told Stacy

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple suspects with varied motives: Chad (ex-boyfriend guilt/redemption), Marv Martin (academic rivalry), Perry Tore (unrequited love/protection), plus unnamed others who could access Gabby's story
suspect_architecture.quote: She noticed Marv Martin proceeding to give her an evil smile. More evil than usual. She topped the list of suspects

red_herring.value: Marv Martin's obvious suspicious behavior and evil smiles designed to draw suspicion away from the true submitter
red_herring.quote: She noticed Marv smirking at Gabby. She topped the list of suspects right away. On everyone's list.

clue_fairness.value: Perry's role as deciding factor on the school board and his knowledge of the story's personal meaning to Gabby are revealed to reader
clue_fairness.quote: Perry had read it, and had been the deciding factor. It conveyed a message, a lesson that Gabby had learned

social_world.value: High school hierarchy with wealthy popular students, academic rivals, and social dynamics around beauty, intelligence, and family wealth
social_world.quote: Gabby was hotter, and everyone knew it. Stacy was smarter than her. Gabby's house was classified as a mansion

media_and_audience.value: School assembly as public forum where the story contest winner is announced, creating institutional validation and public exposure
media_and_audience.quote: Principal Nguey ordered. This is important. Mrs. Fleeuy and I are proud to announce the winner

investigator_wound.value: Gabby's vulnerability around her writing being exposed without consent, tied to her lesson about fame and media addiction
investigator_wound.quote: It was a sci-fi/drama about an alien girl being sucked into the media and becoming addicted to fame and fortune

_meta.title: ebook redhead16 mlm the cheating thief
